author: y4rr
content: Plan: bump trial count from 1000 to 10000 per schema in src/grammar/json_schema.rs::sampled_completions_always_validate. AC-18 in qnd-trial-intel-rs's design doc explicitly requires '≥10 000 sampled completions per schema in a stub backend.' The existing test undercounts at 1000 per schema (5000 total); spec wants 50 000 total. Rough cost: 5×10k×~256 steps×~95-entry ascii vocab×~5-char probe ≈ 600M ops; should still complete in <30s. Update the docstring's '≥1000' to '≥10000' too.
